title: Summer Wonton Soup
description: A refreshing and light Chinese soup perfect for warm weather, featuring delicate wontons in a savory broth.

ingredients.name: Wonton wrappers
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores.

ingredients.name: Vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: You can use store-bought or homemade broth.

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add sliced ginger and minced garlic to the pot.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the flavors are released.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil to the pot.
Cook for 1 minute or until the sauce is well combined.
Prepare the wontons by placing a small spoonful of your desired filling in the center of each wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal the wonton.
Add the wontons to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Add sliced mushrooms to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with chopped scallions.
